title: Calendar view for single users
excerpt: I know monday.com was created for collaboration between teams, but I;ve found it incredibly helpful as a solo business owner. I find it really frustrating though, that I’m unable to use calendar view unless I pay £33 per…

posts.author: clux (Catherine)
posts.cookedHtml: I know monday.com was created for collaboration between teams, but I;ve found it incredibly helpful as a solo business owner. I find it really frustrating though, that I’m unable to use calendar view unless I pay £33 per month for a 3-person team account. Calendar view is such a basic feature and should be standard across accounts. I’m increasingly needing it to work effectively, and struggling without it. Is there any chance of this coming in the future to single users? (or any chance you’ll create a single-user pro account option). If not, I’ll need to move to a different software. My ADHD brain simply cannot work without a calendar view.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Catherine,

I didn’t know that!

You can try Calendar Plus. At the moment you can sign up for its free tier, with the caveat that the free tier only supports one active column. If that’s all you need, great! If you need more at some point, you can upgrade to Pro for about £7 a month and get more columns (and events with durations, information at a glance, and more). Saves you £26

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @clux! We’ve developed a new calendar app, and it’s free for solo account (up to 2 users). check it out: monday.com apps marketplace
